data.title: Bump does...Weaning
data.description: Join us for a relaxed and informative 2-hour workshop on weaning + play, designed to support parents as they prepare, begin or get new ideas for their baby’s food journey. A 1-hour workshop PLUS 1-hour of access to the wonderful BIMBO playroom!
data.address: 9 Bimbo Concept Children's Residency @ Pacific Place Apartments

data.title: Easter 2026 Montessori Play Coaching Workshop
data.description: A practical Montessori-inspired play coaching workshop for children ages 1-4, with parent and child participation (helpers warmly welcome).
data.locationAddress: 1/F Kar Yau Building, 36-44 Queen's Rd E, Wan Chai
